CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-04-2008 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-30-2008 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Dec-16-08 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Hearing On Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor.
Off Calendar Aug-05-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of Three Minors.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Kevin C. Coleman, Esq. appeared with petitioner Jacob Alvarez, Sr., who was present as Guardian ad litem for the minors Isaac Alvarez, Jacob Alvarez, Jr. and Moises Alvarez, who was not present at today's hearing.
Maureen Alvarez was placed under oath and served as Spanish speaking interpreter for petitioner.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount as to Isaac Alvarez - $5,000.00.
Attorney's Fees - $1,365.96.
Medical Expenses - $1,287.00.

A net balance of $2,347.04 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Wells Fargo Bank, located at 2535 Mission Street, San Francisco, CA. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Settlement Amount as to Isaac Alvarez - $6,000.00.
Attorney's Fees - $1,433.75.
Medical Expenses - $2,951.00.

A net balance of $1,615.25 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Wells Fargo Bank, located at 2535 Mission Street, San Francisco, CA. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Settlement Amount as to Moises Alvarez - $5,000.00.
Attorney's Fees - $1,365.96.
Medical Expenses - $2,096.00.

A net balance of $1,537.64 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Wells Fargo Bank, located at 2535 Mission Street, San Francisco, CA. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Orders Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor, and to Deposit Money Into a Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.
